title: Just the little things
description: Make things just a little bit better. A small quality-of-life datapack for your survival world!
body:
# THIS PROJECT IS NO LONGER BEING MAINTAINED.

# Just the little things

### Additions
- Gravity-affected blocks now fall in sync!
- Mangrove Swamps and Normal Swamps now have "Firefly" particles that show up at night.
- Lit Furnaces, Smokers, and Blast Furnaces now sometimes emit campfire particles.
- You can pet your cats and dogs!

### Purpose
Add some small QoL features that make your world just a little bit more lively.
Gravity affected blocks now fall in sync, pet your pets, smokey furnace-like blocks and _fireflies??_ No huge revolutionary features, but it sure does make your world just a little bit more immersive. 

## Notes
- To pet your cats and dogs, Shift + Right Click on them.
- __Block 0 -64 0 and 0 -63 0 will be replaced, make sure they're nothing of importance!__
- Gravity-affected blocks syncing will only apply to falling_block entities in a 30 block radius.
- Furnace-like blocks emitting campfire particles will only emit when a player is near them.
